metadata.description: George Lane's skill library: marketing, SEO, copy, CRO, ads, dev workflow.

plugins.name: ads

plugins.description: Copywriting and content: sales copy, email, social, voice, editing, anti-slop. (20 skills)

plugins.name: cro
plugins.description: Conversion rate optimization: landing pages, forms, popups, signup/onboarding, A/B testing. (10 skills)

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow: TDD, debugging, planning, code review, git worktrees, security. (18 skills)

plugins.name: marketing-strategy

plugins.name: media
plugins.description: Media generation: images, video, audio, screenshots, transcripts, Remotion. (9 skills)

plugins.name: reference-docs
plugins.description: Reference and document tooling: doc creation, PDF handling, OpenAI docs. (3 skills)

plugins.name: seo
plugins.description: SEO toolkit: audits, technical, schema, sitemaps, local, programmatic, content. (19 skills)

plugins.name: web-dev
